text: 🇮🇱 ⚡ 🇱🇧 There are new reports of Israeli airstrikes on southern Lebanon. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡ 🇱🇧 有关以色列空袭黎巴嫩南部的新报道。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡ Trump after Mamdani criticized his war on Iran: 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡ 特朗普在曼达尼批评他对伊朗的战争后： 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Looks like Israel managed to observe the ceasfire for about half an hour. Zionist artillery is now reportedly shelling the city of Bint Jbeil. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 看起来以色列设法遵守了大约半小时的停火协议。据报道，犹太复国主义炮兵目前正在炮击宾特朱拜勒市。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Steve Bannon: I'm a huge advocate of Trump's third term.
text_zh: 史蒂夫·班农：我是特朗普第三个任期的坚定支持者。

text: 🇺🇸 Trump shared a 2 week old Guardian article and is angry at Italy. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普分享了一篇两周前的《卫报》文章，并对意大利感到愤怒。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇵🇰 Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman Ismail Baghaei: The cessation of war in Lebanon was part of a ceasefire agreement between Iran and America. - From the beginning, we have emphasized the need for a simultaneous ceasefire in the entire region, including Lebanon. - We commend the steadfastness of the Lebanese people and resistance fighters in the face of aggression and thank Pakistan for its valuable efforts, especially in the past few hours. - We express our solidarity with the Lebanese people and government and emphasize the necessity of the complete withdrawal of the Zionist entity from the occupied territories. - We emphasize the need to release prisoners, return displaced people, and rebuild destroyed areas and infrastructure with the support of the international community. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇵🇰 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：黎巴嫩战争的停止是伊朗与美国之间停火协议的一部分。- 从一开始，我们就强调整个地区（包括黎巴嫩）需要同时停火。- 我们赞扬黎巴嫩人民和抵抗战士面对侵略时的坚定不移，并感谢巴基斯坦所做的宝贵努力，特别是在过去几个小时内。- 我们对黎巴嫩人民和政府表示声援，并强调犹太复国主义实体必须从被占领土完全撤出。- 我们强调需要释放囚犯、让流离失所者返回家园，并在国际社会的支持下重建被毁坏的地区和基础设施。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: Republican Congressman Troy Nehls says Trump is “almost the second coming” of Christ.
text_zh: 共和党众议员特洛伊·内尔斯称特朗普“几乎是基督的第二次降临”。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Despite calls from the Amal–Hezbollah bloc urging residents of southern Lebanon, the Western Bekaa, and Dahieh to delay their return until the ceasefire situation becomes clearer, many civilians have already begun returning to their homes. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 尽管阿迈勒-真主党集团呼吁黎巴嫩南部、西贝卡和达希耶的居民推迟返回，直到停火局势变得更加明朗，但许多平民已经开始返回家园。 @wfwitness

text: Reporter: Why aren't people feeling better about the economy? Treasury Secretary Bessent: Well, in their heart of hearts they feel good. I'm not sure what they're telling the survey people.
text_zh: 记者：为什么人们对经济的感觉没有好转？财政部长贝森特：嗯，在他们的内心深处，他们感觉很好。我不确定他们对调查人员说了些什么。

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Top Hezbollah official has told an RT correspondent: We are not in a hurry for the ceasefire. If the enemy breaches the agreement, we will respond.. And we will not return to the previous situation. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 一位真主党高级官员告诉今日俄罗斯（RT）记者：我们并不急于停火。如果敌人违反协议，我们将予以回击。我们不会回到过去的情况。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: 🇺🇸 A scoop of meat and a tortilla. This image was shared by a U.S. Marine deployed aboard the USS Tripoli and later posted by USA Today. The second image shows a dinner served on the USS Abraham Lincoln, sent to family members by a service member on board. U.S. service members have reported poor-quality food and small portions during an extended deployment near Iran. Due to prolonged operations and strained supply lines, crews are relying on limited resupply at sea, resulting in rationing and declining morale. Families have attempted to send care packages, but many are not reaching their destinations. The U.S. Postal Service and the Military Postal Service Agency suspended deliveries at the beginning of April due to airspace closures and other logistical challenges related to the ongoing conflict. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 一勺肉和一张玉米饼。这张照片由部署在“的黎波里”号两栖攻击舰上的美国海军陆战队员分享，随后被《今日美国》发布。第二张图片显示了“亚伯拉罕·林肯”号航空母舰上供应的晚餐，由舰上一名军人发送给家人。美国军人报告称，在伊朗附近长期部署期间，食物质量差且分量少。由于长期行动和补给线紧张，船员们依赖有限的海上补给，导致配给制和士气下降。家属们试图寄送爱心包裹，但许多包裹未能送达目的地。由于领空关闭以及与持续冲突相关的其他后勤挑战，美国邮政署和军事邮政局在四月初暂停了投递。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: Sadly, Mayor Mamdani is DESTROYING New York! It has no chance! The United States of America should not contribute to its failure. It will only get WORSE. The TAX, TAX, TAX Policies are SO WRONG. People are fleeing. They must change their ways, AND FAST. History has proven, THIS “STUFF” JUST DOESN’T WORK.
text_zh: 特朗普：可悲的是，马姆达尼市长正在摧毁纽约！它已经没有机会了！美利坚合众国不应助长它的失败。情况只会变得更糟。那些“加税、加税、再加税”的政策大错特错。人们正在逃离。他们必须改变方式，而且要快。历史证明，这些“东西”根本行不通。

text: Trump: Italy wasn’t there for us, we won’t be there for them!
text_zh: 特朗普：意大利当初没支持我们，我们也不会支持他们！

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡ 🇮🇱 Two seriously injured in Karmiel and one injured in Nahariya as a result of Hezbollah's last operation before the ceasefire. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: Visioner RT @StatWatch25 : ✈️ 🇺🇸 The U.S. Department of Defense has awarded a contract to NOVA Group Inc. for the construction of fuel infrastructure in Anchorage, Alaska, to support F-22 Raptor tactical fighter aircraft stationed at Joint Base Elmendorf-Richardson. The contract is valued at $57.9 million, with completion scheduled for July 25, 2029. Video made Grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @StatWatch25 : ✈️ 🇺🇸 美国国防部已授予NOVA集团公司一份合同，用于在阿拉斯加州安克雷奇建设燃料基础设施，以支持驻扎在埃尔门多夫-理查森联合基地的F-22“猛禽”战术战斗机。该合同价值5790万美元，计划于2029年7月25日完工。视频由Grok AI制作 推文

text: OSINTdefender The Nicaraguan flagged crude oil tanker Mali is in the Gulf of Oman approaching its destination of Shinas, Oman. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044888239815659959/photo/1 U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) has published audio from the U.S. Navy Arleigh Burke-class guided missile destroyer USS Michael Murphy (DDG-112) broadcasting a message to the crude oil tanker Mali advising it that the U.S. Navy will escort the ship to its next port of call. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044887407808393239/video/1 - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 悬挂尼加拉瓜国旗的“马里”号原油油轮正在阿曼湾接近其目的地阿曼希纳斯。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044888239815659959/photo/1 美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）发布了美国海军阿利·伯克级导弹驱逐舰“迈克尔·墨菲”号（DDG-112）的音频，广播中告知“马里”号原油油轮，美国海军将护送该船前往下一个停靠港。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044887407808393239/video/1 - OSINTdefender 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) The 10-day ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon/Hezbollah entered force a few minutes ago (at 9:00pm UTC). Let's see how it works out. US President Trump announced that Israel and Lebanon agreed on a 10-day ceasefire following phone calls he held with Lebanon's President Aoun and Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu. Trump also informed that he is inviting the two leaders to the White House for the first meaningful talks between Israel and Lebanon since 1983. - Status-6 (War & Military News) tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 以色列与黎巴嫩/真主党之间的10天停火协议于几分钟前（UTC时间晚上9点）生效。让我们看看结果如何。美国总统特朗普宣布，在与黎巴嫩总统奥恩和以色列总理内塔尼亚胡通电话后，以色列和黎巴嫩同意停火10天。特朗普还表示，他已邀请两位领导人前往白宫，进行自1983年以来以色列和黎巴嫩之间首次有意义的会谈。 - Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 推文

text: U.S. Central Command Audio 🔊 of a Sailor aboard USS Michael Murphy (DDG 112), with video from the guided-missile destroyer’s embarked helicopter flying over the Gulf of Oman, as the U.S. Navy diverts a merchant vessel while enforcing the blockade on ships entering or departing Iranian ports. U.S. forces are prepared to sustain the blockade as long as it takes. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部音频 🔊 来自“迈克尔·墨菲”号（DDG 112）驱逐舰上一名水手的音频，以及该导弹驱逐舰搭载的直升机飞越阿曼湾的视频，当时美国海军正在执行对进出伊朗港口船只的封锁，并拦截了一艘商船。美军准备维持封锁，直到达成目标。 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF says it struck more than 380 Hezbollah targets in southern Lebanon over the past 24 hours, including operatives, headquarters, and rocket launchers. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044884718299038097/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军称，过去24小时内袭击了黎巴嫩南部超过380个真主党目标，包括武装人员、总部和火箭发射器。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044884718299038097/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah fired five rockets at the Galilee Panhandle minutes before the Lebanon ceasefire took effect. Most were intercepted. One hit an open area. The 10-day ceasefire is now in effect. tweet

text: The Spectator Index Pope Leo XIV says 'woe to those who manipulate religion and the very name of God for their own military, economic and political gain, dragging that which is sacred into darkness and filth'. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2044883051264750054/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 教皇利奥十四世说：“祸哉那些为了自己的军事、经济和政治利益而操纵宗教和上帝之名，将神圣之物拖入黑暗和污秽中的人”。 https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2044883051264750054/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Israel’s northern residents remain wary of a ceasefire with Lebanon, demanding the Hezbollah threat be removed entirely. But Israel enters the pause in a stronger position than six weeks ago, after the IDF says it killed more than 1,700 Hezbollah operatives, destroyed hundreds of launchers and thousands of rockets, and expanded its security buffer in southern Lebanon. Hezbollah remains a threat, but its capabilities have been significantly weakened, while Israeli forces now hold a broader zone along the border pending any future peace deal. @ariel_oseran tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列北部居民对与黎巴嫩的停火仍持谨慎态度，要求彻底消除真主党的威胁。但以色列在六周后以更强势的姿态进入停火期，以色列国防军称已击毙超过1700名真主党武装人员，摧毁了数百个发射器和数千枚火箭弹，并扩大了在黎巴嫩南部的安全缓冲区。真主党仍然是一个威胁，但其能力已大大削弱，而以色列军队现在在边境沿线控制着更广阔的区域，等待未来的任何和平协议。 @ariel_oseran 推文

text: ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CENTCOM: The USS Abraham Lincoln is transiting the Arabian Sea as U.S. forces enforce a blockade of Iran's ports and coastline. CENTCOM clarified that the blockade does not extend to the Strait of Hormuz. More than 10,000 American service members, 12 ships and over 100 aircraft are currently enforcing the blockade in regional waters. @wfwitness

text: Visioner RT @StatWatch25 : 🚁 🇺🇸 Procurement of UH-60M Black Hawk Helicopters for the U.S. Army The U.S. Department of Defense has awarded a contract to Sikorsky for the delivery of ten UH-60M Black Hawk helicopters for the U.S. Army. The agreement is valued at $65 million, with completion scheduled for December 31, 2026. The work will be carried out in Stratford, Connecticut. Because nothing says “routine procurement” like quietly adding more Black Hawks to the fleet. Video made Grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @StatWatch25 ：🚁 🇺🇸 美国陆军采购UH-60M“黑鹰”直升机。美国国防部已授予西科斯基公司一份合同，为美国陆军交付十架UH-60M“黑鹰”直升机。该协议价值6500万美元，计划于2026年12月31日完成。工作将在康涅狄格州斯特拉特福进行。因为没有什么比悄悄增加更多“黑鹰”直升机更能体现“常规采购”了。视频由Grok AI制作 推文

text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231 ：🇺🇲 2013年阿富汗战争 - 美国陆军特种作战部队与第3步兵师士兵及阿富汗特种作战部队（阿富汗突击队）的头盔摄像头画面。一支小队在巡逻行动中与塔利班武装分子交火。https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2044879476979322913/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated The General Staff confirms a strike on the Tuapse oil refinery. The fire has been burning for more than 15 hours. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2044879521766158349/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 总参谋部证实对图阿普谢炼油厂进行了打击。大火已燃烧超过15小时。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2044879521766158349/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Trump was asked about the attack on Ukraine and gave a very brief answer. It’s strange that he didn't add how good his relationship with Putin is. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2044878687674171454/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 特朗普被问及对乌克兰的袭击时，给出了非常简短的回答。奇怪的是，他没有补充说他与普京的关系有多好。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2044878687674171454/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 The UAE welcomed the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire and praised Trump's efforts to reach the deal. Abu Dhabi said it hopes the ceasefire will support regional stability and backed Lebanon's moves to consolidate all weapons under state control and dismantle terrorist organizations. The Gulf Cooperation Council also welcomed the agreement. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最新消息 🔴 阿联酋欢迎以色列-黎巴嫩停火，并赞扬特朗普为达成该协议所做的努力。阿布扎比表示，希望停火能支持地区稳定，并支持黎巴嫩将所有武器置于国家控制之下并解散恐怖组织的举措。海湾合作委员会也对该协议表示欢迎。推文

text: U.S. Central Command USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN 72) transits the Arabian Sea as the United States blockades Iran's ports and coastline. U.S. forces are NOT blockading the Strait of Hormuz. More than 10,000 American service members, 12+ ships, and 100+ aircraft have enforced the blockade in regional waters, ensuring that no vessels violate the President's proclamation. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 亚伯拉罕·林肯号航空母舰（CVN 72）在美军封锁伊朗港口和海岸线时穿越阿拉伯海。美军并未封锁霍尔木兹海峡。超过10,000名美军士兵、12艘以上舰艇和100多架飞机已在区域水域执行封锁，确保没有任何船只违反总统的公告。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian Foreign Ministry emphasized "the necessity of Israel's complete withdrawal from the occupied areas in southern Lebanon." Iran's foreign ministry: Tehran welcomes the ceasefire announced between Israel and Lebanon. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗外交部强调“以色列必须完全撤出黎巴嫩南部被占领土”。伊朗外交部：德黑兰欢迎以色列和黎巴嫩之间宣布的停火。 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran's foreign ministry: Tehran welcomes the ceasefire announced between Israel and Lebanon. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗外交部：德黑兰欢迎以色列和黎巴嫩之间宣布的停火。推文
